faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What type of financial consulting do you offer?
faq.a1: We offer financial consulting including budgeting, financial planning, cost management, and financial analysis for small and medium-sized projects.
faq.q2: Can you help me prepare a financial plan for my project?
faq.a2: Yes, we provide a comprehensive financial planning service that includes projected revenues, expenses, cash flow, and profitability analysis.
faq.q3: Do you offer financial statement preparation or review services?
faq.a3: Yes, we offer services for preparing financial statements (balance sheet, income statement, cash flow) or reviewing them if already prepared.
faq.q4: What kind of administrative services do you offer?
faq.a4: We help businesses develop organizational structures, internal policies, improve operations, and build effective teams.
faq.q5: Do you assist in preparing procedural manuals or policies?
faq.a5: Yes, we provide services for preparing procedural manuals, employee handbooks, and designing formal work policies.
faq.q6: Do you offer ready-made marketing plans?
faq.a6: Yes, we create strategic marketing plans tailored to each project, including market research, target audience identification, and channel selection.
faq.q7: Do you manage social media accounts?
faq.a7: We offer consulting and guidance on content management, but we only manage accounts directly within specific packages.
faq.q8: Do you offer software consulting or website development?
faq.a8: Yes, we provide technical consulting related to selecting suitable systems, managing tech projects, and evaluating software proposals.
faq.q9: Can you help me choose an ERP or CRM system?
faq.a9: Absolutely, we assist you in selecting the right system based on your business needs and evaluating available market options.
faq.q10: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
faq.a10: Yes, we have a flexible refund policy within the first 7 days of the consultation date, provided the service hasn’t been fully utilized.
faq.q11: How can I book a consultation?
faq.a11: You can book through the website using the booking form or contact us directly via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q12: How can I contact Rakez Solutions?
faq.a12: You can reach us via the website form or directly through the support email.
faq.a13: Yes! We support both English and Arabic languages.
